mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_name = #{userName} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM user WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%') AND show_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{showName}, '%') ORDER BY user_id DESC LIMIT #{page}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%') AND show_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{showName}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (user_name, password, show_name, phone, email, company_name, company_address, role_id, status) VALUES (#{userName}, #{password}, #{showName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{companyName}, #{companyAddress}, #{roleId}, #{status})
mapper.update:
UPDATE user
show_name = #{showName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, company_name = #{companyName}, company_address = #{companyAddress}, role_id = #{roleId}, status = #{status}, password = #{password},
WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE user SET deleted = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
